name: First State Bank
description_short: Junction, TX's First State Bank at 601 College St provides banking and ATM access to residents and local businesses.
description_long:
First State Bank operates a full-service branch location at 601 College St in Junction, TX. This standalone branch is easily accessible to Junction residents seeking in-person banking services, account management, and ATM access. While specific hours are not currently published, customers in Junction are encouraged to contact the branch directly to confirm service times and plan their visits accordingly.

At this Junction, TX location, First State Bank offers a comprehensive range of banking services for both personal and business customers. Whether you need to make deposits, manage your accounts, or access other banking services, the College St branch in Junction is equipped to assist you. For detailed information about specific services or to schedule an appointment, reach out to the branch directly.

For Junction, TX residents and business owners, First State Bank's College St location offers convenient local banking access. When visiting this branch, bring valid government-issued identification and any relevant account documents. First State Bank is dedicated to serving the Junction community with reliable, personalized financial services.
